titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Divinity School Theses
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Yale Divinity School Library staff

controlnote.p: This encoded findingaid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: finding aid prepared according to local divinity library descriptive practices.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday December 10, 2025 at 18:00
Series that listed theses on microfiche eliminated. Access to theses starting 1975 should be through Orbis.

did.unittitle: Yale Divinity School Theses
did.abstract: The theses in Series I (1939-1966) were submitted to YDS for a variety of degree programs. The theses in Series II (1975-1985) were submitted for the S.T.M. degree at Yale Divinity School. Series III contains additional theses that have some Yale connection. The theses in this collection are mostly from Yale Divinity School, but some theses related to Yale or its collections are also included. More recent YDS S.T.M. theses are catalogued in Orbis, the Yale Library catalogue.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Divinity School STM Theses (RG 41), Special Collections, Yale Divinity Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Over the years there have been varying practices regarding the deposit of YDS theses in the Divinity Library. This collection is not comprehensive of all YDS theses ever submitted for degrees, but rather merely represents the ones that have been deposited in the library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The theses in Series I (1939-1966) were submitted to YDS for a variety of degree programs. They are arranged alphabetically by author.
The theses in Series II (1975-1985) were submitted for the S.T.M. degree at Yale Divinity School. They are arranged by year and then by author.
More recent YDS theses are catalogued individually in Orbis, Yale's library catalogue and can be found by doing a keyword search for "S.T.M. Yale Divinity School".

Series III contains additional theses that have some Yale connection. The theses in this collection are mostly from Yale Divinity School, but some theses related to Yale or its collections are also included. Over the years there have been varying practices regarding the deposit of YDS theses in the Divinity Library. This collection is not comprehensive of all YDS theses ever submitted for degrees, but rather represents merely the ones that have been deposited in the library. The papers are grouped by the year in which they were submitted and are arranged alphabetically by author within each year.

did.unittitle: Early YDS theses
Akagi, Tai: Why Christian Education? - Prolegomena. (2 copies)
Arnold, John William: Pioneer Protestant Educational Missions to China, 1807-1857. (2 copies)
Ashley, Albert R.: The Southern Methodist Church. (2 copies)
Ayers, Stephen: A Study of the Commission on Evangelism and Devotional Life of the Congregational Denomination in America. (2 copies)
Ball, George Hudson: Some Behavior Traits of American Soldiers in the Forces of Occupation with Special Reference to Ethical and Cultural Norms. (2 copies)
Barnes, Paul E.: Christian Conversion: The Meaning and Relevance of Conversion in the Light of New Testament Thought. (2 copies)
Beamesderfer, Sam H.: William Temple's Idea of God. (2 copies)
Benson, W.E.: The Christian Life Course of the United Lutheran Church of America: An Evaluation. (1 copy)
Bock, Paul: Ecumenical Reconstruction in Europe. (2 copies)
Boehmke, A. Karl: Visitation Evangelism in the American Churches. (2 copies)
Bollman, Oscar P.: The Foreign Mission School of Cornwall, Connecticut. (ABCFM) (2 copies)
Bruking, Renate: Die Schupfungsvorstellung in Prov. 8, 22-31 (1 copy)
Brown, Ray Bryan: The Form of the Church in the New Testament. (2 copies)
Bull, Robert Jehu: Arnobius of Sicca, Christian Apologist. (2 copies)
Burkle, Howard R.: Austin Farrer's View of Revelation and Reason. (2 copies)
Campbell, Wilbur Fred: Dwight L. Moody and Religious Education. (2 copies)
Carlson, Robert L.: A Critique of Richard Hooker's Law of Ecclesiastical Polity. (2 copies)
Cartwright, Colbert Scott: The Life of Joseph Bellamy, 1719-1790. (2 copies)
Clowney, Edmund P., Jr.: The Doctrine of the Self in the Philosophical Works of Soren Kierkegaard (2 copies)
Cox, Alva I., Jr.: The Methodist Contribution to the Ecumenical Discussion of the Nature of the Church, the Ministry and Sacraments (1 copy)
Durden, Lewis Minyon: The Army Character Guidance Program (2 copies)
Esbjornson, Robert G.: Luther W. Youngdahl: A Christian in Politics (2 copies)
Evans, Roy Morgan: American Colonization Society (2 copies)
Farrar, James A.: Youth in the Church: A Manual on the Organization and Program of Youth Work for Adult Leaders of Youth in the Disciples of Christ Churches (2 copies)
Finkenbine, Russell C.: Luther and Henry VIII (2 copies)
Fraser, William P.: Authority in the Theology of John Wesley (2 copies)
Gustafson, Henry A., Jr.: Paul's Conception of the Atonement and Its Relevance to Modern Preaching" (2 copies)
Hall, (William McLaurine?): Organization of the Northern Baptist Convention (2 copies)
Harada, David J.: Toward A Theology of the Mission of the Church (1 copy)
Harris, Carl Y.: Origen: On Prayer (2 copies)
Hawthorne, Robert J.: Doctrines of the Incarnation and Views of Man, in Three Thinkers: Irenaeus, William E. Channing, and Emil Brunner (2 copies)
Hilgeman, Theophilus F. H.: The Life of Philip Schaff (2 copies)
Horricks, J. T.: The Doctrine of Christian Nurture in the Heritage of the United Church of Canada (2 copies)
Hostetter, Mark James: Pastoral Counseling (2 copies)
Hudson, R. L.: A Burden for Souls: The Story of Sister Aimee and the Foursquare Gospel (2 copies)
Imler, William A.: The Evangelistic Campaigns of Shehrwood Eddy in India and China: 1896-1931 (2 copies)
Johnson, Alvin D.: A Study of the Place of Religion in Wesleyan University: 1831-1948, or Wesleyan's Religious Tradition (2 copies)
Jones, Robert D.: America and Preaching During the Depression Years: 1930-1934 (2 copies)

Keucher, Werner Gerald: The Decisions in the McCollum Case: People of the State of Illinois, ex rel. Vashti McCollum vs. Board of Education School District No. 71, Champaign County, Illinois, et. al., (No. 90, October Term, 1947, 333 U.S. 203) (2 copies)
Kidder, Maurice Arthur: On the Teaching of Religion to Undergraduates (2 copies)
Kildegaard, Axel C., Jr.: N.F.S. Grundtvie's Concept of Church and Community (2 copies)
Kitney, Harold R.: An Introduction to the Study of Church Music and Worship (2 copies)
Krapt, Gustav-Adolf: Karl Barth's Criticism of Friedrich Schleiermacher: An Evaluation (2 copies)
Lawson, Harold B.: Speech Personality in Relation to the Army Chaplain (2 copies)
Long, John D.: An Inquiry into the Concept of the Church as Revealed in the Lyman Beecher Lectures (2 copies)
McManus, Harold Lynn: The Russian Church From the Conversion of Vladimir to the Bolshevik Revolution, (989-1917) (2 copies)
Marx, Werner G.: Training Christian Workers Among a People of Low Cultural Level (2 copies)
Mattingly, L. Edward: A Social Message for a Preaching Mission (2 copies)
Meuser, Fred W.: Luther's Teaching on Baptism (2 copies)
Moss, John A.: Representative Views of Man in Relation to Political Theory (1 copy)
Myers, Howard William: The Ends of Government in Some Representative Christian Thinkers (2 copies)
Neuser, Wilhelm: Das Gesetz in der Theologie Philip Melanchthons (2 copies)
Ogasawara, Masatoshi: Luther's Iosa of the Church (2 copies)
Oniki, Shozi Garry: Interracial Churches in American Protestantism (2 copies)
Oosthuysen, Jacobus C.: The Dutch Reformed Churches and Inter-Group Relations in the Union of South Africa with Special Reference to the Period 1948-1958 (1 copy)
Osborne, Byron Lindley, Jr.: The Person and Work of Jesus Christ in the Writings of John Wesley (2 copies)
Post, Avery D.: The Preaching of Charles Reynolds Brown (2 copies)
Rahn, Robert William: Schweitzer's Missionary Motivation (2 copies)
Richards, Earnest D.: Anglican Views and Movements Towards Church Unity (2 copies)
Richards, Egbert W.: Birth Control Legislation in Connecticut: A Study in the Conflict of Divergent Religious Views (2 copies)
Sakata, Suteichi: On Charles Harold Dobb's Realized Eschatology (2 copies)
Sengel, William R.: A Study of the Northern Urban Negro Church in the United States (2 copies)
Shriver, Donald W., Jr.: Church Membership Requirements in Seventeenth Century New England Puritanism (1 copy)
Sie, Ping-teh: Inquiry into the Religious Value of Mohism (2 copies)
Smith, John Howard: William Allen Harper, Christian Educator (2 copies)
Sonnack, Iver A.: The Development of Protestant Higher Education in China (2 copies)
Spilman, Kenneth E.: The Small Church and the State College (2 copies)
Strain, Dudley: The Prophets (2 copies)
Tivade, David J.: The Social Gospel and the Social Order (2 copies)
Torrence, Edgar C.: Informal Adult Education in the Young Men's Christian Associations of the United States (2 copies)
Trick, J. Gordon: Religious Liberty in the Thought of Francis Wayland (1796-1865) (2 copies)
Weinland, David E.: The Formulation and Specific Application of a Christian Philosophy of Higher Education (2 copies)
West, William Garrett: The History of the East Association and Consociation of New Haven County with Special Reference to Ecclesiastical Courts 1786-1838 (2 copies)
Westerberg, Wesley Magnus: Gustaf Aulen and the New Lutherforschung in Contemporary Swedish Theology (2 copies)
Zuck, Lowell H.: The Zurich Anabaptists and the Rebirth of Christendom (2 copies)
YDS STM theses
Cockburn, Michael: The Mission of the Church in the Development of a South Caribbean People. Advisors: Kyaw Than, Charles Forman
Conner, Gerald W.: Perspectives of Pastoral Ministry. Advisors: Edward F. Dobihal, Jr., James Clague
Flower, Edward E., Jr.: The Significance of Divine Presence in Pastoral Care. Advisors: Edward F. Dobihal, Jr., James G. Clague
Kuck, David W.: The Use and Canonization of Acts in the Early Church. Advisors: Rowan Greer, Abraham Malherbe

Nehring, David: A Dependable Ministry: a pilot study of some effects of the Tavistock model of group relations training on selected British clergy and religious institutions. Advisors: Edward F. Dobihal, Jr., Michael Allen
Evans, Linda Mary: An Exploration into the Nature of Suffering Through a Study of Persons. Advisor: Edward F. Dobihal, Jr.
Rhorer, Thomas L.: Preserving the Earth: Approaches to Man's Relationship with Other Creatures. Advisors: David H. Kelsey, Gene Outka
Schulze, Thomas Robert: Anointing of the Sick: Some Traditions and Symbolisms of Christian Healing. Advisors: Aidan Kavanaugh, Henri J. M. Nouwen
Mathew, Thomson K.: Pastoral Care Problems Unique to Pentecostal Congregations. Advisors:Francis X. Cheney, Barbara Hargrove
Morris, Donald Dean: The Doctrine of Divine Efficiency in the Theology of Nathanael Emmons. Advisors: Sydney E. Ahlstrom, Colin W. Williams
Oostrom, Alexander Quirinus Maria: Guilt and Forgiveness. Advisors: Henri Nouwen, Robert Anderson
Colon, Ruben Dario: C.S. Lewis and Becoming a Thoughtful Person. Advisors: Paul L. Holmer, Randolph C. Miller
Gneuhs, Geoffrey B.: Peter Maurin: The Life and Thought of the Founder of the Catholic Worker Movement. Advisors: George Lindbeck, Margaret Farley

Harbour, William D.: The Ministry of Sustaining in the Pastoral Care of a Particular Group of the Sick: Hospitalized Open Heart Surgery Patients and Cancer Patients. Advisors: Eward J. Dobihal, Jr., Luke T. Johnson
Jensen, Janice C.: Confirmation: The Birth of a Lutheran Christian (One Stream from Luther to the Service Book and Hymnal). Advisors: Aidan Kavanaugh, George Lindbeck
Lawther, Richard C.: Meditations on the Church and the Power. Advisors: Paul L. Holmer, Colin W. Williams
McClester, John. A Liturgical History of Battell Chapel 1930-1975. Advisors: Jeffery Rowthorn, E. William Muehl
Dunham, Robert E.: The Self and Its Potential: Theological Considerations. Advisors: David H. Kelsey, Gene Outka
Lin, Paul Sunbeng: Paul's Conversion and His Mission. Advisors: Nils A. Dahl, Carl Holladay
Quarm, Samuel E. A.: Pastoral Care in Relation to Polygamy Versus Monogamy in Ghana: A Study in Pastoral Care and African Christianity. Advisors: Harry Adams, David Allen
Wardlaw, Theodore J.: H. Richard Niebuhr's Thought on the Church: A Genetic Study. Advisors: Sydney E. Ahlstrom, Rowan A. Greer
Brown, Leroy: Ministry of the Black Church to the Black Family. Advisors: Charles Brown, Leon Watts.
Coho, Frank E.: The Augsburg-Confession Hymn of Nicolaus Ludwig, Count von Zinzendorf. Advisors: George Lindbeck, Jeffrey Rowthorn
Fete, Josept N.: The Cultural Background of the Roman Ritual of Baptism. Advisors: Aidan Kavanagh
Norwood, M. Thomas, Jr.: Cherishing the Word: The Canon and the Community of Faith. Advisors: Brevard Childs
Nunez, Joseph Armando: The Privilege of the Poor. Advisors: Letty Russell
Thornhill, Cleveland S., II: The role of the Contemporary Christian Church in Health Care: A Case Study. Advisors: Edward Dobihal, Jr.

Campbell, Charles: Christians and the American Political Process: A Study of the Relationship Between Christianity and Politics in the Thought of John Courtney Murray, John Howard Yoder, and John C. Bennett. Advisors: Margaret Farley, William Muehl
Choi, Jai-Keun: A Historical Study of the Shinto Shrine Worship in the Korean Church. Advisors: Charles Forman, John Stroup
Ebenezer, Catherine: Sex Roles, Evolution and Ethics: A Critique of Alice Rossi's "A Biosocial Perspective on Parenting". Advisors: Margaret Farley, Letty Russell
Hawkins, William L: Infant Baptism in the Thought of John Calvin and Karl Barth: A Problem in Reformed Theology
Moody, Charles C.: Tertullian, Cyprian and Martyr-Theology in Third Centure Carthage. Advisors: Rowan Greer, George Lindbeck
Roffey, John W.: Wisdom, Law and Blessing: An Ethical Hermeneutic of Deuteronomy and Matthew. Advisors: Brevard Childs, Robert Wilson
Seitz, Christopher R.: The Place of the Servant Songs in Second Isaiah. Advisors: Robert Wilson, Lansing Hicks

Sevaaetasi, Leanavaotana Sekuini: A Study of the Cultural and Indigenous Religious Beliefs, and Their Help and Influence in the Understanding, and the Accepting of Christianity in Samoa. Advisors: Letty Russell, Charles Forman
Simmons, Michael Bland: A Study of Graeco-Roman Pagan and Christian Soteriologies of the Second Century A.D. Advisors: Rowan Greer, John Stroup
Kim, Bock-Ja: Autonomy of Language in L. Wittgenstein
Choi, Doug Sung: The Conflicts on the Views of the Bible in the Presbyterian Church of Korea
Other theses
Beach, Waldo: The Meaning and Authority of Conscience in Protestant Thought of Seventeenth Century England (Yale Ph.D.) (1 copy)
Dawson, Dana, Jr.: A History of the Development of the Pacificist Movement in the Methodist Episcopal Church 1917-1932 (YDS Seminar) (1 copy)
Eminhizer, Earl E.: The Rise and Fall of the Triennial Convention (M.Th. Thesis, Crozer Theological Seminary, Chester, PA) (1 copy)
Hamrick, Randall Bender: An Evaluation of Contemporary Anglo-Catholic Ethics as Interpreted by Alfred E. Taylor and Kenneth Kirk (Yale Ph.D.) (1 copy)

Wiley, Edward Emerson, Jr.: Religion in Colonial Georgia (Yale M.A.) (1 copy)
